bottom_y.description: Bottom Y coordinate of content area (above nav bar)
bottom_y.title: Bottom Y

top_y.description: Top Y coordinate of content area (below notification bar)
top_y.title: Top Y

ahash.description: Average hash of the content area
ahash.title: Ahash

content_bounds.description: Content area bounds used for hashing

dhash.description: Difference hash of the content area
dhash.title: Dhash

phash.description: Perceptual hash of the content area
phash.title: Phash

icon_detections_after_nms.description: Number of icon detections after NMS filtering
icon_detections_after_nms.title: Icon Detections After Nms

icon_detections_before_nms.description: Number of icon detections before NMS filtering
icon_detections_before_nms.title: Icon Detections Before Nms

confidence_threshold.description: Minimum confidence threshold for detections and OCR results
confidence_threshold.title: Confidence Threshold

LocateBBox.description: Pixel-space bbox returned by the VLM for the located element.
LocateBBox.title: LocateBBox

LocateRequest.description:
Argus /inference/locate request.

The caller pre-computes OCR via /inference/infer (or reuses cached
results keyed by frame hash) and passes the text list here. Argus does
NOT re-run OCR; the VLM call uses the provided `texts` as grounding
context.

model.description: VLM model to use; must be one of the models from GET /inference/models. Omit to use the server's configured default. The system prompt is fixed to the element-locator task.
model.title: Model

texts.description: Pre-computed OCR text elements. Empty list means Argus skips OCR grounding and asks the VLM to locate from the image alone.
texts.title: Texts

LocateRequest.title: LocateRequest

LocateResponse.description:
Argus /inference/locate response.

Exactly one of `matched_text_index` or `bbox` is populated when
`found` is True. `matched_text_index` indicates the VLM grounded its
answer to a specific OCR text element (pixel-accurate bbox available
via the original `texts` list). `bbox` is a free-form VLM bbox.

bbox.description: Pixel-space bbox. None when matched_text_index is set or found=False.

completion_tokens.description: Completion (output) tokens the model billed for this call
completion_tokens.title: Completion Tokens

found.description: Whether the VLM located the target
found.title: Found

matched_text_index.description: Index into the request `texts` list when the answer is OCR-grounded.
matched_text_index.title: Matched Text Index

model.description: Model identifier returned by the provider
model.title: Model

prompt_tokens.description: Prompt (input) tokens the model billed for this call
prompt_tokens.title: Prompt Tokens

LocateResponse.title: LocateResponse

ModelInfo.description: One supported model and its pricing, as a standard /v1/models catalog row.

id.description: Model identifier, e.g. 'anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.5' or 'axilio/argus-ocr-pro-1'. VLM ids are passed as `model` to /vision/locate; Axilio ids identify the engine behind /vision/detect calls (selected via `ocr_engine` / `inference_type`) and are what usage rows are labeled with.
id.title: Id

type.description: Model type: 'vlm' for the vision-language models served by /vision/locate; 'detect', 'ocr', and 'vision' for the Axilio model line behind /vision/detect.
type.title: Type

ModelInfo.title: ModelInfo

ModelPricing.description:
The customer's billed rates in USD.

VLMs price per token (input/output); the Axilio model line prices per
page, where one screenshot is one page — so per_page reads as the price
of one call. A rate is "0" when that unit is free for the model.

per_page.description: USD per page (one screenshot = one page) for the per-page-billed Axilio models. Absent for per-token models.
per_page.title: Per Page

ModelPricing.title: ModelPricing

SupportedModelsResponse.description:
Response for GET /vision/models.

Lists every model Argus supports, each with its final post-markup
pricing: the curated VLMs for the element-locator task (per-token
pricing; pass their id as `model` to /vision/locate) and the Axilio
model line behind /vision/detect (per-page pricing; selected via the
`ocr_engine` and `inference_type` request fields — lite = the free
engine, pro = premium). Lets a client compare cost and validate
`find(model=...)` up front instead of round-tripping to /locate and
getting a 400.

The VLM set is curated: `/locate` enforces it — an unsupported model is
rejected, so this is the authoritative allowlist, not just advisory.
The Axilio ids are not /locate targets.

Shaped like a standard /v1/models response ({object: "list", data: [...]}).
SupportedModelsResponse.title: SupportedModelsResponse

TextElementInput.description: OCR-detected text element to seed the VLM's grounding context.

bbox.description: Normalized [0, 1] bbox in the source image

TextElementInput.title: TextElementInput

get.description:
List every model Argus supports, with pricing.

Two families: the curated VLMs served by /vision/locate (per-token
pricing; pass their id as `model`) and the Axilio model line behind
/vision/detect (per-page pricing; selected via `ocr_engine` /
`inference_type` — lite is the free engine, pro is premium).

Public: no API key required (it's a catalog of model names and public
prices, nothing sensitive), so a client can discover supported models
before it holds credentials. The SDK fetches this once, caches it, and
validates find(model=...) locally so a typo fails fast with a clean
error instead of a 400 from /locate.
